loading: 🐉 Negotiating with the local dragon for safe passage…
📜 Transcribing the quest scroll in elvish…
🧙 Consulting the wizard about weather conditions…
🍺 Ensuring the tavern at the destination is fully stocked…
🌿 Asking the forest spirits for their blessing…
🦉 Waiting for the owl to confirm delivery of invitations…
⭐ Aligning the stars for optimal quest conditions…
🐿️ Briefing the squirrel scouts on the route…

2026: 📅 2026?! The dragons haven't finished their migration yet! Absolutely out of the question.
🧙 The Oracle has spoken — 2026 is too soon. We dare not.
🐉 2026 is when Gerald the Dragon is using the venue. You don't argue with Gerald.
2028: ⏳ 2028?! By then the fellowship will have aged into wizards! We act NOW... well, in 2027.
🌋 The prophecy clearly states 2028 brings the Great Cheese Famine. No feasting, no quest.
🦉 The owls refuse to deliver invitations that far in advance. It's a union thing.

startErrors.nothingSelected: 🗺️ No destination, no year, and half the fellowship is missing. Did you even try?
startErrors.noYear: 📅 The stars need a year to align! Pick 2027 — the prophecy demands it.
noDestination: 🗺️ There can't be an adventure without a destination! Where art thou going, wanderers?
🧭 Thy fellowship stands ready... but ready to go WHERE exactly?
📜 The scroll remains blank! Choose a realm before the quest begins!
missingCompanions: ⚔️ WE CANNOT LEAVE WITHOUT {names}!! They would never forgive us!
🍺 {names} is still at the tavern! We ride for NO ONE until they join!
😤 {names} didn't pack their bags for NOTHING! Get them on the quest!
startErrors.noDestinationAndMissing: 🗺️ There can't be an adventure without a destination! Also {count} companion{s} still napping!

Marcos: I'll come, but I also take cheese taxes
Cam: All animals en route have been catalogued.

congrats.title: The Quest Begins!
congrats.fellowship: The fellowship of {names} shall journey to {destination} in {year}. May thy adventure be legendary!
congrats.keyword: To confirm thy allegiance, send a raven to thy adventurers bearing the sacred keyword: {keyword}
